pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Load Balancer Listener implements encryption at rest and in transit. All sensitive configurations are parameterized to enforce organizational standards.

pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Infrastructure as Code ensures consistent, repeatable deployments of Load Balancer Listener.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Configurable resource sizing allows teams to match capacity to actual workload requirements.

pillars.title: Performance Efficiency
pillars.description: Load balancing distributes traffic across healthy targets.

features: Encryption at rest and in transit
